result.stdout:
No arguments
Database Shrinker
Manual 
-c "connection string" : a single connection string to shrink
-s "path/of/a/connections.json" : a json file with connection string(s) to 
shrink
-v : show version
-h : shows this help

Options
-l : log to file
-y : skip confirmation
-a : shrink all database(s)
-o : shrink only large database(s)
-d : set simple recovery mode and drop transaction log

commands.payload:
No arguments
Database Shrinker
Manual 
-c "connection string" : a single connection string to shrink
-s "path/of/a/connections.json" : a json file with connection string(s) to 
shrink
-v : show version
-h : shows this help

Options

-y : skip confirmation
-a : shrink all database(s)
-o : shrink only large database(s)
-d : set simple recovery mode and drop transaction log
